action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval score 0.5768 with alpha=1.2, no stuck. Alpha=0.7+stuck scored 0.5605 - higher success but worse distance. Distance is critical in score formula (300/d_i). Test script has bug with stuck_alpha param. Analysis: Need to test higher alpha values to reduce distance, and fix the test script. Also need to reconsider the stuck detection approach - it lowers alpha too much, causing long detours. Decision: Fix test script, test higher alpha values (1.3-2.0) and different stuck strategies. Focus on reducing distance while maintaining success rate.
